headline: ZOETIS INC (NYSE:ZTS) Shows Strong Value Potential with Attractive Valuation and High Profitability
summary: ZOETIS INC (ZTS) scores 7/10 in fundamental value analysis with low P/E of 11.94, 81.75% ROE, and strong profitability. A value stock offering discount valuation with steady growth prospects.
